subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up from Vendor Inc. I'd be glad to help get a meeting scheduled to explore how we might work together.

For next week, I'm available on Tuesday or Thursday afternoon (2pm-5pm UTC) or Wednesday morning (9am-12pm UTC). A 30-minute call works well — just let me know which slot suits you best.

Regarding direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I don't have access to share internal contact directories or phone numbers. My suggestion would be to have our introductory call first, and if there's alignment, I can help facilitate the right introductions internally for any senior-level technical discussions.

Let me know what timing works for you and I'll get it locked in.

Best regards
